title: Eva Platinum R2 w collectors box
display_title: Eva Platinum R2 w collectors box
wikitext:
[]: Eva Platinum R2 /w collectors box?             Quote Post by AzzWipe » Mon Feb 28, 2005 5:55 pm Hey there. New member here... Is it possible to get the 1st volume of the Evangelion Platinum DVDs in R2 WITH the collectors box? I live in EU so it would be more convinient to buy the R2 volumes instead of buying the first volume in R1 to get the box and then R2s from there. I hope that made sense.

[]:             Quote Post by Cogboy » Tue Mar 01, 2005 5:08 am if you can get them seperately in region 2 then you should be able to get number 1 with the box as well.

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Tue Mar 01, 2005 11:30 am Hey welcome Yeah i think you can buy them from amazon.com.It is possible..

[]:             Quote Post by Titus » Tue Mar 01, 2005 11:42 am the_seventh_child wrote: Hey welcome Yeah i think you can buy them from amazon.com.It is possible..

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Tue Mar 01, 2005 11:56 am Titus wrote: the_seventh_child wrote: Hey welcome Yeah i think you can buy them from amazon.com.It is possible..

[]:             Quote Post by anatrok » Tue Mar 01, 2005 3:50 pm You know region code's are so screwed up. Man, urg. I'm gonna tear this fucking monopoly up, and buy myself a region free DVD player.

[]:             Quote Post by Titus » Thu Mar 03, 2005 11:51 am AARRRHHGGG! Not the region code shit again, OK, Ill *tries to remain calm, but grabs walking stick from old lady and beats her to death shortly before returning to his computer* explain this again. All you need is a DVD rom,/writer/re-writer/combo drive/?anything else?/, get a dvd ripper, and rip the crap - saves it on the harddrive! - and no cd or region code crap for the rest of the data's(the movie file) existance.... And 7, Ive tried, really! Everytime I click on check out, it tells me that the product isn't shippable to the RSA, under some kind of trading violation, blablabla..... So, what else can we bitch/debate/moan/flame/fight/.. about?

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Thu Mar 03, 2005 11:59 am You can touch the bios of your PC's DVD reader to be multiregion.

[]:             Quote Post by Timesplitter 01 » Fri Mar 04, 2005 10:36 pm Titus wrote: the_seventh_child wrote: Hey welcome Yeah i think you can buy them from amazon.com.It is possible..

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Sat Mar 05, 2005 6:47 am Titus wrote: And 7, Ive tried, really! Everytime I click on check out, it tells me that the product isn't shippable to the RSA, under some kind of trading violation, blablabla..... So, what else can we bitch/debate/moan/flame/fight/.. about?

[]:             Quote Post by AzzWipe » Sat Mar 05, 2005 6:44 pm Thanks for all the replies. I can't buy the DVD from amazon.com since they only sell R1 DVDs. I've looked everywhere for a website that sells the R2 version with the box. I guess I could live without the box, but it sure looks nice! :( ... oh well what really matters is the series itself, but if anyone comes across a website that sells the box or the R2 vers. with box then please tell me

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Sun Mar 06, 2005 9:46 am AzzWipe wrote: Thanks for all the replies. I can't buy the DVD from amazon.com since they only sell R1 DVDs. I've looked everywhere for a website that sells the R2 version with the box. I guess I could live without the box, but it sure looks nice! :( ... oh well what really matters is the series itself, but if anyone comes across a website that sells the box or the R2 vers. with box then please tell me

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Mar 06, 2005 8:59 pm Wow. An Eva forum where the world "Amazon" is not rendered into six asterices. :shudders with delight:

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Mon Mar 07, 2005 3:18 pm Reichu wrote: Wow. An Eva forum where the world "Amazon" is not rendered into six asterices. :shudders with delight:

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Mon Mar 07, 2005 4:59 pm It means that the dark hand of capitalism has yet to drag our beloved Monkey down kicking and screaming into the pits of hell.

[]:             Quote Post by Soluzar » Mon Mar 07, 2005 9:30 pm Dave wrote: It means that the dark hand of capitalism has yet to drag our beloved Monkey down kicking and screaming into the pits of hell.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Mar 07, 2005 10:10 pm Soluzar wrote: Oh well, there's always the chainsaw, if it ever does! Right, Reichu?

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Tue Mar 08, 2005 6:51 am Reichu wrote: Seventh -- sorry, that comment was directed at those here familiar with the lovely policy changes the once-glorious ANF forums have recently been imposing. Things like "Amazon" and "Ebay" are blanked out as readily as "ass", "whore", and "slut". Hmm, do they REALLY think they'll make more money that way?
